channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: TrueVault (YC W14) Is Hiring a Director of Product – Privacy SaaS (Remote)

item.title: Building Ethereum Wallet Authentication with FastAPI and Web3.py
item.description: Structuring and building a web3 wallet authentication is not as hard as it sounds and with the right guidance and attitude, you will find building backend systems for dApps (not just wallet auth)...

item.title: How to Convert PNG to WebP (And Why Your Website Needs It)
item.description: If you're still serving PNG images on your website, you're leaving performance on the table. Google has been pushing WebP for years. It's smaller than PNG, loads faster, and directly impacts your...

item.title: # Building EduForge AI — Turning Lessons Into Interactive Games with AI 🚀
item.description: For the #BuiltWithMeDo Hackathon, I wanted to explore a simple question: What if teachers could instantly turn any lesson into an interactive learning experience using AI? That idea became...

item.title: How to make a Django application using GitHub Copilot
item.description: We'll develop a simple password generator Django application using GitHub Copilot agent mode. At the end we'll analyze the tradeoffs of using LLMs to develop this application. To do this we'll use...

item.title: What 14 EDR vendors won't tell you about source code, SBOMs, and update controls
item.description: Ever asked your EDR vendor for an SBOM or source code access? A recent study did it for 14 of them. Most security teams evaluate EDR-EPP based on detection rates and remediation features. But what...

item.title: We’re Expected to Figure Out Life in Our 20s
item.description: There's a particular kind of quiet you only get at 22. It usually shows up around 11 PM or 7 AM (for graveyard folks like me), after the work messages stop and you've closed the last tab, and you...

item.title:
# Building EduForge AI — Turning Lessons Into Interactive Games with AI 🚀
For the #BuiltWithMeDo Hackathon, I wanted to explore a simple question:
> What if teachers could instantly turn any lesson into an interactive learning experience using AI?
I Built Archivolt: An AI Architecture Blueprint Generator. Here's What I Learned.
item.description: I Built Archivolt: An AI Architecture Blueprint Generator. Here's What I Learned. I built Archivolt because I faced a constant problem as a software engineer: designing systems that break when...

item.title: claude -p alternative for CI/CD: a 50-line fix for June 15 Pricing Split
item.description: This is a follow-up to my previous post where I built poor-claude to keep my AI family alive. That solution uses MCP Channels and a persistent session daemon — powerful, but a lot of machinery....

item.title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
item.description: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.

item.title: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial
item.description: A big theme in the trial’s final days was whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is trustworthy.

item.title: Revamped Siri will reportedly offer auto-deleting chats
item.description: Apple is hoping that its record on privacy can be the differentiator on the AI front, and maybe even buy it a little slack as it continues to lag behind the competition. According to Bloomberg's...

item.title: University of Arizona students boo Eric Schmidt’s AI cheerleading during commencement
item.description: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt delivered the commencement address at the University of Arizona on Friday. And, as his speech veered into talk of AI, he was repeatedly drowned out by boos. AI is...

item.title: If you’re giving a commencement speech in 2026, maybe don’t mention AI
item.description: It's tough to get graduating students excited about a future shaped by artificial intelligence.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: The AI skills arms race is coming for automotive
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: Oddity is masterfully tense horror from the director of Hokum
item.description: Hokum recently hit theaters, and it's already outperforming box office expectations. If this Kubrick-referencing haunted hotel flick starring Adam Scott was your introduction to director Damian...

item.title: Fujifilm’s X Half is even more whimsical with a $300 price cut
item.description: Fujifilm’s X Half digital camera wasn’t designed to replace your main camera, though you’d be forgiven for assuming it was with its ludicrous $850 price. However, the company recently reduced the...

item.title: ElliQ is a surprisingly helpful companion robot for older adults
item.description: A week before the ElliQ robot arrived, a neurologist told me we need to rebalance my mom's life. Her Parkinson's disease medication had steadily become less effective over the previous month, and...

item.title: Chatbots at the drive-thru are just the beginning
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more news about how AI is seeping into our daily lives, follow Emma Roth. The Stepback arrives...

item.title: NGINX CVE-2026-42945 Exploited in the Wild, Causing Worker Crashes and Possible RCE
item.description: A newly disclosed security flaw impacting NGINX Plus and NGINX Open has come under active exploitation in the wild, days after its public disclosure, according to VulnCheck. The vulnerability,...

item.title: Grafana GitHub Token Breach Led to Codebase Download and Extortion Attempt
item.description: Grafana has disclosed that an "unauthorized party" obtained a token that granted them the ability to access the company's GitHub environment and download its codebase. "Our investigation has...

item.title: The haves and have nots of the AI gold rush
item.description: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

item.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
item.description: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

item.title: Snap, YouTube, and TikTok settle suit over harm to students
item.description: Snap, YouTube, and TikTok have settled the first lawsuit of its kind, alleging that social media addiction has cost public schools massive amounts of money, according to Bloomberg. The suit, filed...

item.title: Sony tries to explain that its AI Camera Assistant doesn’t suck
item.description: After Sony drew some unwanted attention for a post demonstrating its AI Camera Assistant on the Xperia 1 XIII, it's trying to clarify how the feature works. The company says it doesn't edit...

item.title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
item.description: OpenAI's latest shakeup comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.

item.title: Funnel Builder Flaw Under Active Exploitation Enables WooCommerce Checkout Skimming
item.description: A critical security vulnerability impacting the Funnel Builder plugin for WordPress has come under active exploitation in the wild to inject malicious JavaScript code into WooCommerce checkout...

item.title: NPR’s Manoush Zomorodi talks about living with too much tech
item.description: Manoush Zamorodi is an accomplished reporter, podcast host, and author. Her new book, Body Electric, takes a comprehensive look at how technology is impacting our physical health. It's a...

item.title: Turtle Beach made a good SteelSeries headset clone that’s $50 less
item.description: I really liked the SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless, so the company didn't have to say much to get me excited about its successor. The $399 Nova Pro Omni that came out on May 5th has a similar...
